summary: The diff implements the vast majority of requirements including full backend CRUD and cart/order logic in backend/main.mo, all five frontend pages (Home, Shop, Product Detail, Cart, Checkout), a sticky navigation with cart badge, luxurious theme with ivory/blush/gold palette and serif fonts, image helpers referencing frontend/public/assets/generated, and a promo marquee banner. A few specific acceptance criteria items have gaps due to truncated/omitted files.

missing_requirements.requirement: Display an order confirmation message with the order ID on a dedicated confirmation page after placing an order.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows an OrderConfirmationPage imported and routed in App.tsx, but its file content is omitted from the diff among truncated files. It cannot be confirmed that the confirmation message with the order ID is actually rendered.

missing_requirements.requirement: Build a Product Catalog page with responsive grid, category and price range filters, and product cards with Add to Cart calling the backend.
missing_requirements.reason: ShopPage is imported and routed in App.tsx, but its file content is omitted from the diff. The ProductFilters component exists, but the ShopPage wiring cannot be confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Build a Product Detail page showing all product fields, quantity selector, disabled Add to Cart when stock is 0, accessible via /product/:id.
missing_requirements.reason: ProductDetailPage is imported and routed in App.tsx, but its file content is omitted from the diff. All acceptance criteria cannot be confirmed.

hallucinated_features.description: A dedicated OrderConfirmationPage route at /order-confirmation was added as a separate page.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only specifies displaying a confirmation message with the order ID after checkout; a fully separate route was not explicitly requested.

hallucinated_features.description: A Footer component with brand description, quick links, Our Promise section, and a caffeine.ai attribution link was added.
hallucinated_features.reason: No footer was mentioned in the build requirements. Only a sticky navigation bar was specified in REQ-9.

hallucinated_features.description: A Features Section and a full-width CTA section were added to the HomePage beyond the hero banner, featured products, and promo strip.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-4 specifies only hero banner, featured products grid, and promotional banner for the homepage. Additional marketing sections were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Mobile navigation menu with hamburger toggle was implemented in the Navigation component.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-9 specifies a sticky top navigation bar but does not mention mobile responsive hamburger menu behavior.
